Microwave Egg Sandwich.3: Coat a 6-oz. ramekin cup with cooking spray
Microwave Egg Sandwich.1: Pour 1 egg into the ramekin cup
Microwave Egg Sandwich.4: Microwave the ramekin cup uncovered on high for 30 seconds
Microwave Egg Sandwich.12: Cut the English muffin into two pieces with a knife
Microwave Egg Sandwich.8: Continue to Microwave for 15-30 more seconds or until the egg is almost set
Microwave Egg Sandwich.6: Top cup with 1 tablespoon of salsa
Microwave Egg Sandwich.5: sprinkle 1 tablespoon of cheese on cup
Microwave Egg Sandwich.10: Microwave just until cheese melts, about 10 seconds
Microwave Egg Sandwich.9: Line the bottom piece of the English muffin with lettuce
Microwave Egg Sandwich.2: Place the egg from the cup over the lettuce
Microwave Egg Sandwich.7: replace the top of the English muffin

Dressed Up Meatballs.21: Place 5 meatballs in a Microwave-safe plate
Dressed Up Meatballs.23: Mix 1/4 cup sweet-and-sour sauce and 1/2 teaspoon soy sauce in a small bowl
Dressed Up Meatballs.22: Cut 1/4 medium carrot into short, thin strips
Dressed Up Meatballs.24: Top the plate with the carrots, onion, garlic and 1/4 tsp pepper powder
Dressed Up Meatballs.15: Pour the sauces over the meatballs
Dressed Up Meatballs.20: Microwave the plate, covered, on high for 1.5 minutes
Dressed Up Meatballs.18: Stir the contents in the microwave with a spoon

Microwave Mug Pizza.35: Measure 1/16 teaspoon of baking soda and add it to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.28: Measure 1/8 teaspoon of salt and add it to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.40: Measure 1/8 teaspoon of baking powder and add it to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.33: Measure 4 tablespoons of flour and add it to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.38: Stir the contents in the mug well
Microwave Mug Pizza.41: Add in 3 tablespoons of milk to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.34: 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.37: Mix the contents of the mug thoroughly. (There might be some lumps, but that is ok.)
Microwave Mug Pizza.31: spread marinara sauce around the surface of the batter
Microwave Mug Pizza.39: Sprinkle 1 generous tablespoon of mozzarella cheese on top of the sauce
Microwave Mug Pizza.29: Sprinkle dried Italian herbs inside the mug
Microwave Mug Pizza.32: Microwave for 1 minute 20 seconds, or until it rises and the toppings are bubbling

Ramen.51: Chop 1 garlic clove on a cutting board
Ramen.44: Remove the noodles from the package(Break Noodles / Keep them as a block)
Ramen.54: Put all the Vegetables in a microwave-safe bowl
Ramen.52: Add the noodles to the bowl
Ramen.49: Cover with a lid (or paper towel) to prevent splattering
Ramen.48: Let the noodles sit for about 1 minute after the microwave stops
Ramen.53: Add chopped cilantro to the bowl
Ramen.42: Mix in the flavour packet to the bowl
Ramen.43: Stir noodles with a spoon or fork until the flavouring dissolves

Coffee.69: Place the dripper on top of a coffee mug
Coffee.67: Grind the coffee beans until the coffee grounds are the consistency of coarse sand, about 20 seconds
Coffee.62: Prepare the filter insert by folding the paper filter in half to create a semi-circle, and in half again to create a quarter-circle
Coffee.60: Place the paper filter in the dripper
Coffee.64: Boil the water. (While the water is boiling, assemble the filter cone)
Coffee.59: spread open filter in dripper to create a cone
Coffee.71: Once the water has boiled, check the temperature of the water
Coffee.58: Transfer the grounds to the filter cone
Coffee.57: Pour a small amount of water into the filter to wet the grounds
Coffee.56: Wait about 30 seconds for the coffee to bloom
Coffee.61: Slowly pour the rest of the water over the grounds in a circular motion. Do not overfill beyond the top of the paper filter
Coffee.66: Let the coffee drain completely into the mug before removing the dripper
Coffee.63: Discard the paper filter and coffee grounds

Breakfast Burritos.77: Extract and add contents of an egg to a microwave-safe bowl
Breakfast Burritos.81: Place 8 inch tortilla on a cutting board
Breakfast Burritos.73: Microwave for 3 minutes, stirring in between
Breakfast Burritos.74: Add 1/2 tbsp sweet and sour sauce to the bowl
Breakfast Burritos.80: Add 1 tbsp salsa to the bowl
Breakfast Burritos.76: Mix the contents of the bowl well
Breakfast Burritos.79: Pour egg mixture on top of the tortilla
Breakfast Burritos.75: Sprinkle 1 tbsp shredded cheddar cheese on top of the egg
Breakfast Burritos.78: Roll the tortilla from one end to another into a log shape

Spiced Hot Chocolate.88: Fill a microwave-safe mug with skimmed milk
Spiced Hot Chocolate.89: Microwave the contents of the mug for 1 minute
Spiced Hot Chocolate.90: Add 2 pieces of chocolate to the mug
Spiced Hot Chocolate.84: Add 1/5 teaspoon cinnamon to the mug
Spiced Hot Chocolate.87: Add 1 teaspoon of white sugar to the mug
Spiced Hot Chocolate.85: Mix the contents of the mug
Spiced Hot Chocolate.83: Heat the contents of the mug for 1 minute and serve

Microwave French Toast.99: Cut or tear 1 slices of bread into bite-size pieces
Microwave French Toast.94: In a large mug, melt 1 tablespoon of softened butter in the microwave for about 30 seconds
Microwave French Toast.98: Roll the butter around in the mug to coat it
Microwave French Toast.101: In the mug, whisk one egg with a fork until well blended
Microwave French Toast.95: Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon over the egg
Microwave French Toast.100: Add 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract to the mug
Microwave French Toast.92: add bread pieces to the egg mixture in the mug, pressing the bread down into the egg
Microwave French Toast.91: Microwave on high for 90 seconds until the egg is cooked through
Microwave French Toast.97: Put the mug's contents on a plate
Microwave French Toast.96: cut the contents on plate, and serve

Pinwheels.115: Place 8-inch flour tortilla on cutting board
Pinwheels.113: Use a butter knife to scoop nut butter from the jar
Pinwheels.112: Spread nut butter onto the tortilla, leaving 1/2-inch uncovered at the edges
Pinwheels.118: Clean the knife by wiping it with a paper towel
Pinwheels.111: Use the knife to scoop jelly from the jar
Pinwheels.107: Spread jelly over the nut butter
Pinwheels.104: Clean the knife by wiping with a paper towel
Pinwheels.116: Roll the tortilla from one end to the other into a log shape, about 1.5 inches thick
Pinwheels.110: Secure the rolled tortilla by inserting 5 toothpicks about 1 inch apart
Pinwheels.114: Trim the ends of the tortilla roll with the butter knife, leaving 1/2 inch margin between the last toothpick and the end of the roll
Pinwheels.106: Slide floss under the tortilla, perpendicular to the length of the roll
Pinwheels.117: Place the floss halfway between toothpicks
Pinwheels.105: Cross the floss's two ends over the tortilla roll's top
Pinwheels.108: pull the floss ends in opposite directions to slice
Pinwheels.102: Continue slicing with floss to create 1 more pinwheel
Pinwheels.109: Place the pinwheels on a plate

Tomato Mozzarella Salad.122: gently dry it with a paper/tea towel
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.119: Slice one tomato into about 1/2 inch thick slices
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.120: Place the thick slices of tomatoes on a platter, ensuring they only make a single layer
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.124: Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top of the tomato throughout the platter
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.123: Season the tomato slices with salt
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.126: Season platter with 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
Tomato Mozzarella Salad.121: Add a drizzle of extra-virgin olive oil, about 1 tablespoon, over the entire platter

Butter Corn Cup.137: Thaw the frozen corn by putting it in a sieve and running it under cold water
Butter Corn Cup.132: Add the corn into a microwave-safe bowl
Butter Corn Cup.130: 1 teaspoon of pepper powder to the bowl
Butter Corn Cup.134: Microwave the corn for 3 more minutes
Butter Corn Cup.136: Add 1 teaspoon salt to the bowl
Butter Corn Cup.128: add lime juice to the bowl
Butter Corn Cup.76: Mix the contents of the bowl well

Tomato Chutney.155: Chop tomato roughly (anysize chunks are fine)
Tomato Chutney.150: puree tomatoes without any water in a blender/mixer
Tomato Chutney.154: Heat 3 tbsp oil in a pan over medium heat
Tomato Chutney.141: 1/2 tsp cumin seeds to the pan
Tomato Chutney.139: Add 1/4 tsp mustard to the pan
Tomato Chutney.152: When mustard and cumin seeds begin to sizzle, add minced garlic
Tomato Chutney.147: Add 2 tbsp red chili powder to the pan
Tomato Chutney.157: mix well contents of the pan
Tomato Chutney.142: Add tomato puree to the pan
Tomato Chutney.144: Mix well tomato puree with contents in the pan
Tomato Chutney.153: Allow the mixture to simmer over low heat for 5 minutes or until the mixture becomes thick
Tomato Chutney.143: Take the pan off the heat
Tomato Chutney.156: Transfer it to a serving bowl

Scrambled Eggs.167: Crack one egg in the bowl
Scrambled Eggs.177: add 1 tbsp milk to the bowl
Scrambled Eggs.164: add 1/3 tsp salt to the bowl
Scrambled Eggs.159: Whisk the egg mixture in the bowl
Scrambled Eggs.173: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a heavy-bottomed or nonstick pan on medium heat
Scrambled Eggs.178: add 1/3 tsp salt to the pan
Scrambled Eggs.179: add chopped onions to the pan
Scrambled Eggs.166: Saute the onions on medium heat until they are soft and translucent
Scrambled Eggs.168: Add 1/8 tsp of turmeric to the pan
Scrambled Eggs.170: Cook covered for 1 minute or until the tomatoes soften
Scrambled Eggs.172: Slowly pour the whisked eggs into the pan
Scrambled Eggs.171: Keep mixing with a spatula for 3 minutes or until the eggs are almost cooked
Scrambled Eggs.174: Garnish with 1 tbsp chopped cilantro and serve

Cucumber Raita.183: In a mixing bowl, whisk 1 cup of chilled curd until smooth. Use fresh homemade or packaged curd
Cucumber Raita.181: 1/4 teaspoon of red chilli powder to the bowl
Cucumber Raita.191: 1/2 teaspoon of chaat masala powder to the bowl
Cucumber Raita.188: Add 1 teaspoon of cumin powder to the bowl
Cucumber Raita.187: add 1 tablespoon of chopped cilantro leaves to the bowl
Cucumber Raita.190: Add the chopped or grated cucumber to the whisked curd
Cucumber Raita.186: Combine all the ingredients in the bowl

Zoodles.203: Spiralize 1 medium zucchini into thin noodles using a spiralizer
Zoodles.196: Heat a large pan on medium heat
Zoodles.199: Add 1 large minced garlic cloves to the pan
Zoodles.202: Cook garlic until fragrant (about 1 minutes). Be careful not to burn garlic
Zoodles.192: Cook for 2 minutes or until the zoodles are done
Zoodles.195: Top with more parmesan if desired

Sauted Mushrooms.205: pat rinsed mushrooms dry with a paper towel
Sauted Mushrooms.215: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Sauted Mushrooms.208: Once the pan is hot, add the mushrooms
Sauted Mushrooms.213: cook for 3-5 minutes, stirring often, until mushrooms start to soften and brown
Sauted Mushrooms.209: Add chopped shallot to the pan
Sauted Mushrooms.207: cook the pan, often stirring, for 1 minute
Sauted Mushrooms.218: Add 2 cloves of minced garlic to the pan
Sauted Mushrooms.217: 1/4 tbsp balsamic vinegar to the pan
Sauted Mushrooms.216: Transfer the contents of the pan to a serving dish

Blender Banana Pancakes.221: 1/2 tsp baking powder to a blender
Blender Banana Pancakes.232: 1 heaped tbsp flour to a blender
Blender Banana Pancakes.223: Melt a small knob of butter in a non-stick frying pan over low-medium heat
Blender Banana Pancakes.231: Pour three little puddles straight from the blender into the frying pan
Blender Banana Pancakes.226: Cook for 1 min or until the tops start to bubble
Blender Banana Pancakes.228: Flip the pancakes with a fork or a fish slice spatula
Blender Banana Pancakes.222: Serve the pancakes with chopped strawberries

Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.239: crack one egg in a bowl
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.242: add the chopped cilantro to the bowl
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.249: 1/2 tsp ground black pepper to the bowl
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.248: Beat the contents of the bowl
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.235: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a non-stick frying pan
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.240: cook the tomatoes cut-side down until they start to soften and colour
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.244: Scoop the tomatoes from the pan
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.236: put tomatoes on a serving plate
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.241: Pour the egg mixture into the pan
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.238: stir gently with a wooden spoon so the egg that sets on the base of the pan moves to enable the uncooked egg to flow into the space
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.245: Stop stirring when it's nearly cooked to allow it to set into an omelette
Herb Omelet with Fried Tomatoes.243: Transfer omelette to the plate and serve with the tomatoes

Broccoli Stir Fry.268: Add 1/8 teaspoon black pepper to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.250: Add 1/8 cup soy sauce to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.254: Add 1 teaspoon cornstarch to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.267: Add 1/2 tablespoon minced ginger to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.255: Add 2 cloves minced garlic to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.252: Add 1 tablespoon honey to the bowl
Broccoli Stir Fry.266: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat
Broccoli Stir Fry.258: add sliced mushrooms to the skillet
Broccoli Stir Fry.253: cook, stirring often, for 4 minutes. If the pan gets too hot on medium-high, turn the heat down to medium
Broccoli Stir Fry.261: Add bell pepper to the skillet
Broccoli Stir Fry.274: continue cooking, stirring often, for 2-3 minutes, until vegetables are crisp-tender
Broccoli Stir Fry.272: Whisk the sauce again to recombine the ingredients
Broccoli Stir Fry.256: Pour the sauce into the skillet
Broccoli Stir Fry.264: cook, stirring, for 1 minute until the sauce thickens

Pan Fried Tofu.275: Cut 1/4 block or 3 ounces of fresh tofu into large cubes (about 1 in x 1 in)
Pan Fried Tofu.293: pat tofu dry with a towel
Pan Fried Tofu.291: Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to a non-stick pan
Pan Fried Tofu.279: add the tofu cubes to the pan
Pan Fried Tofu.286: add 1/4 tsp salt to the pan
Pan Fried Tofu.276: Turn on the heat to medium
Pan Fried Tofu.292: Cook 5 to 6 minutes until tofu cubes are lightly browned on the bottom
Pan Fried Tofu.280: Briefly remove the pan from the heat to reduce spitting
Pan Fried Tofu.282: Briefly remove from the heat again
Pan Fried Tofu.277: drizzle 1 tablespoon soy sauce (watch for spitting) on the pan
Pan Fried Tofu.278: drizzle with the 1 tablespoons sesame oil on the pan
Pan Fried Tofu.288: cook pan for 2 minutes until the colour is darkened

Mug Cake.304: 1/4 tsp baking powder to the bowl
Mug Cake.303: Place the paper cupcake liner inside the mug
Mug Cake.310: a pinch of salt to the mixing bowl
Mug Cake.297: 1.5 tbsp sugar to the mixing bowl
Mug Cake.299: Measure and add 2 tbsp flour to the mixing bowl
Mug Cake.308: Whisk to combine mixture of flour, sugar and baking powder in the bowl
Mug Cake.313: 1/4 tsp vanilla extract to the bowl
Mug Cake.300: Measure and add 2 tsp vegetable oil to the bowl
Mug Cake.294: Whisk batter until no lumps remain
Mug Cake.312: Microwave the mug and batter on high power for 60 seconds. Check if the cake is done by inserting and toothpick into the center of the cake and then removing it. If wet batter clings to the toothpick, microwave for an additional 5 seconds. If the toothpick comes out clean, continue
Mug Cake.309: Invert the mug to release the cake onto a plate
Mug Cake.305: Allow to cool until it is no longer hot to the touch
Mug Cake.295: then carefully remove the paper liner
Mug Cake.298: While the cake is cooling, prepare to pipe the frosting. Scoop 4 spoonfuls of chocolate frosting into a zip-top bag
Mug Cake.311: seal zip top bag, removing as much air as possible
Mug Cake.306: Use scissors to cut one corner from the bag to create a small opening 1/4 inch in diameter
Mug Cake.302: Squeeze the frosting through the opening to apply small dollops of frosting to the plate in a circle around the base of the cake

Cheese Pimiento.321: Chop 1/4 red bell pepper into tiny bits
Cheese Pimiento.322: Place the chopped pepper in the microwave-safe bowl
Cheese Pimiento.316: Add 1/3 cup cheddar cheese to a microwave-safe cup
Cheese Pimiento.320: Add 1 tablespoons of water to the bowl
Cheese Pimiento.323: Melt the cheese by microwaving cup for 30 sec. (Check after 30 seconds and microwave for 10 seconds more if needed)
Cheese Pimiento.318: Microwave the bowl, covered, for 2 minutes
Cheese Pimiento.317: Mix the cheese and red bell pepper in the bowl
Cheese Pimiento.315: Add 1/4 teaspoon salt to the bowl
Cheese Pimiento.319: Add 1/4 teaspoon pepper to the bowl
Cheese Pimiento.314: add 1/2 tbsp softened butter to the bowl
Cheese Pimiento.324: Mix all the ingredients of the bowl well

Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.325: place avocado slices on each leaf
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.339: 1 tsp Sriracha sauce to the bowl
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.333: add chopped scallion to the bowl
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.334: Add 1 can drained tuna to the bowl
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.331: Mix the contents of the bowl
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.326: season 1/4 tsp pepper on the bowl
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.332: top lettuce leaves with the tuna mixture
Spicy Tuna Avocado Wraps.337: secure the wrap with a toothpick

Caprese Bruschetta.342: 1/8 cup shredded mozzarella to a bowl
Caprese Bruschetta.344: Slice two 1/2 inch thick rounds from a baguette (slice slanted)
Caprese Bruschetta.349: Brush 2 slices of baguette with olive oil on both sides
Caprese Bruschetta.352: Toast both sides of the slices on the pan for 2 to 3 minutes until lightly charred and crispy and transfer the slices to a plate
Caprese Bruschetta.350: Cut 1/4 cup of cherry tomatoes into halves
Caprese Bruschetta.351: In a bowl, add the cut cherry tomatoes
Caprese Bruschetta.348: Combine the contents of the bowl
Caprese Bruschetta.345: Spoon the mixture from the bowl onto the bread
